data.title: Shenandoah Telecommunications Company to Hold its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call at 8:30 a.m. on Friday, May 1, 2026
data.description: Shenandoah Telecommunications Company is set to conduct its earnings call for the first quarter of 2026 at 8:30 a.m. on Friday, May 1, 2026. The call will provide insights into the company's financial performance during this period, offering investors and stakeholders a comprehensive overview. This event marks an important milestone for the company and will be crucial in understanding its growth and future prospects.

data.title: Hubbell to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on April 30, 2006
data.description: Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) has disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 before the market opens on April 30th. The company will also be hosting an Analysts' Conference Call at 10:00 AM ET on the same day to delve into the results.

data.title: Media Alert: Southern Glazer’s Wine & Spirits Leader to Speak at MODEX 2026 Panel on AI, Automation and Supply Chain Resilience
data.description: Karli Sage, the Vice President of Supply Chain Management, Technology, and Engineering at Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits, has been selected as a panelist for MODEX 2026.

data.title: Copa® Brings Its 40-Year Beach Legacy and Expertise Directly to Consumers with New DTC Launch
data.description: Copa®, a family-owned brand known for introducing the Brazilian beach chair to the U.S. market in 1988, is now directly reaching consumers with its 40-year legacy through a newly launched website. The website features not only Copa's signature beach essentials but also specially curated bundles, catering to families looking to enhance their beach experience. The company's journey began over four decades ago with a romantic tale, and now, with this online platform, they are aiming to make beach days more convenient for customers.

data.title: REOS - VIRUNGA CRITICAL HIGHLIGHTS US GOVERNMENT POLICY AND ANNOUNCES CORPORATE STRATEGY FOR TUNGSTEN COMMERCIALIZATION
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Virunga Critical Inc., a mining and critical minerals firm headquartered in Delaware, is emphasizing the significance of the executive order on critical minerals. The order was signed by President Trump on January 15, 2026. This order, titled "Adjusting Imports of," specifically targets the Democratic Republic of Congo as a valuable source for these minerals. The company is directing attention to the potential impact of this order on the mining sector.

data.title: Seal Shield Launches Complete UV-C Sanitization Suite Featuring Vioguard at AORN 2026
data.description: Seal Shield LLC, a renowned global provider of hygienic medical-grade devices, disclosed the introduction of its full UV-C sanitization solution suite at the AORN 2026 Global Surgical Conference & Expo in New Orleans, LA on April 13, 2026. This announcement comes after the company's participation in recent events.

data.title: Ripley PR wins top honor in global Merit Awards for Adventure PR launch
data.description: Ripley PR, a prestigious global public relations firm based in Knoxville, Tennessee, has recently gained recognition for the successful launch of its latest specialty division. The agency, known for its expertise in skilled trades, franchising, manufacturing, and B2B technology, announced this achievement on April 13, 2026, through a press release distributed by PRNewswire.

data.title: AFDG - COPPER INTELLIGENCE, INC. ANNOUNCES BOARD OF DIRECTOR ADDITIONS
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Copper Intelligence Inc. proudly revealed new appointments to its Board of Directors. Jean Bosco Kanku Kalumbu brings a wealth of experience to the role, with a background in international pastoral leadership, humanitarian diplomacy, and strategic lobbying. The company expressed gratitude for the opportunity to welcome such a multifaceted leader to the team.

data.title: Roku to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30
data.description: Today, Roku, Inc. (Stock Ticker: ROKU) from San Jose, California, revealed plans to unveil their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 30, after the stock market closes. The announcement included details about a live webcast of the earnings call scheduled for 2:00 PM Pacific Time on the same day. Those interested can tune in to the live webcast in listen-only mode through the Roku investor relations website. Furthermore, an archived version of the conference call will be accessible on the Roku investor relations website after the event.

data.title: Rumble Launches Exchange Offer for Northern Data to Create a Unified Video, Cloud and AI Growth Platform
data.description: The merger of the two companies positions the combined entity to become a leader in AI infrastructure. The acceptance period for the offer begins today and will run until May 9, 2026. Rumble has already garnered commitments for around 72% of the outstanding shares of Northern Data. There is no specified minimum acceptance threshold for the offer. If the offer is successfully closed, the shares of Northern Data will be delisted promptly. Both the Management Board and Supervisory Board of Northern Data are planning to support the offer.

data.title: Kid Spark Education Launches Transformative Early Childhood STEM & Literacy Program
data.description: A newly introduced hands-on program aims to support the development of curiosity, confidence, and essential STEM and literacy skills in young learners. Recently launched in Webb City, Missouri on April 9, 2026, the Early Childhood STEM & Literacy Program by Kid Spark Education offers an innovative learning experience for Pre-K students. This initiative is designed to foster foundational skills in STEM and literacy, benefiting children in their formative years.

data.title: Maris-Tech to Showcase Edge-Based Video Intelligence at Milipol TechX 2026 in Singapore
data.description: Introducing cutting-edge technology that allows for live, on-board video analysis to be conducted in vital operations within challenging and limited-bandwidth settings.

data.title: Lithium Ionic Confirms Valid Title to Brazilian Mineral Claims
data.description: In Toronto on April 13, 2026, Lithium Ionic Corp. (TSXV: LTH; OTCQX: LTHCF; FSE: H3N), known as "Lithium Ionic," issued a follow-up to its previous update on April 10, 2026.

data.title: NextGen Healthcare Launches Bold Platform Future with New Brand Identity
data.description: NextGen Healthcare, a prominent healthtech company based in New York, is embarking on a new phase of innovation in platform and services. This initiative is marked by a revamped brand identity that underscores the company's dedication to streamlining healthcare operations and providing tailored solutions for a wide range of ambulatory practices. Transitioning from a traditional system of record, NextGen Healthcare is moving towards a more advanced model termed as a "system of context and action." This transformation involves integrating cutting-edge technologies like AI and agentic orchestration into their core platforms. Through this evolution, NextGen Healthcare aims to address the changing landscape of healthcare by offering more efficient and effective solutions.

data.title: Lomiko Metals Announces Private Placement for Gross Proceeds of up to C$500,000 and Provides Community Update
data.description: Lomiko Metals Inc. is excited to disclose a private placement opportunity, known as the Offering, aiming to raise up to $500,000 in total proceeds. This initiative involves issuing 5,000,000 units of the Company at a price of C$0.10 per Unit. Each Unit comprises one common share and one-half common share purchase warrant. Upon completion, the holders of these warrants will be entitled to purchase one common share.

data.title: Physician-Scientist Dr. Qian Yuan Runs All Seven World Marathon Majors in One Year to Accelerate Food Allergy Research
data.description: In Boston, physician-scientist Dr. Qian Yuan is embarking on a remarkable endurance feat - to conquer all seven World Marathon Majors within a single year. Boston marks his next stop as he aims to increase awareness about Food Allergy and highlight the strides made by the Food Allergy Science Initiative (FASI) in advancing research on food allergies and related conditions. Following a recent personal best at the Tokyo Marathon, finishing in an impressive 4 hours, 49 minutes, and 1 second, Dr. Yuan is ready to tackle this formidable challenge.
